title: Pipeline Self Test: Automated News Build
desc: Internal self-test article validating the automated build pipeline produces correct schema, sitemap, and blog grid updates end to end.
keywords: pipeline test, automated publishing, news build
cta: Want this built for your business?
body:
June 6, 2026. This is a self-test body used only to validate the build pipeline. It contains a paragraph, an ordered list, and an internal link with no em dashes.

What this checks

  1. NewsArticle, Breadcrumb, and FAQPage schema injection.
  2. Sitemap, news-sitemap merge, and RSS feed updates.
  3. The blog grid card sync.

It also includes a service link so the conversion path is exercised.
faqs: No, it is an internal self-test used to validate the pipeline before publishing real news.
Schema injection, index updates, and the blog grid sync, with zero em dashes.
No, it is removed after the pipeline is confirmed working.
